items.title: Instacart Scales Personalized Marketing via Configuration-Driven Multi-Tenant Platform
items.summaryShort: Instacart Scales Personalized Marketing via Configuration-Driven Multi-Tenant Platform. Instacart redesigned its personalized marketing system using a configuration-driven multi-tenant architecture on Storefront Pro.

items.title: Presentation: Graph RAG: Building Smarter Retrieval Workflows with Knowledge Graphs
items.summaryShort: Presentation: Graph RAG: Building Smarter Retrieval Workflows with Knowledge Graphs. Cassie Shum discusses the architectural evolution of GraphRAG and why data foundations are critical for advanced AI workflows.

items.title: HeroUI v3 Lands as a Ground-Up Rewrite for React and React Native, Built on Tailwind CSS v4
items.summaryShort: HeroUI v3 Lands as a Ground-Up Rewrite for React and React Native, Built on Tailwind CSS v4. HeroUI v3 is a redesigned React component library, previously NextUI, offering over 75 components, including 21 new ones, and a new React Native li

items.title: Presentation: The Infrastructure Challenge Behind Production AI
items.summaryShort: Presentation: The Infrastructure Challenge Behind Production AI. The panelists explain the realities of running AI systems reliably at scale.

items.title: Presentation: Trustworthy Productivity: Securing AI-Accelerated Development
items.summaryShort: Presentation: Trustworthy Productivity: Securing AI-Accelerated Development. Sriram Madapusi Vasudevan discusses industry-converging patterns for securing autonomous AI agents in production.

items.title: Venice AI becomes a unicorn with $65M Series A as its privacy-first AI platform takes off
items.summaryShort: Venice AI becomes a unicorn with $65M Series A as its privacy-first AI platform takes off. Venice AI is already profitable, with annualized run-rate revenues of over $70 million, CEO Erik Voorhees said.

items.title: Gemini Spark, Google's agentic assistant, is now available on Mac
items.summaryShort: Gemini Spark, Google's agentic assistant, is now available on Mac. Google's 24/7 agentic assistant, Gemini Spark, comes to Mac alongside other improvements, like real-time tracking and support for more apps.

items.title: Sony to end physical PlayStation game disc production in 2028
items.summaryShort: Sony to end physical PlayStation game disc production in 2028. Sony will stop producing physical discs for all new PlayStation games beginning in 2028, as the company embraces an all-digital future.
